name: Mock Crab Stir Fry
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the bamboo shoots and soak them in warm water for 15 minutes; shred very fine.
2. Discard the tips of the Chinese mushrooms and shred.
3. Mix together the sugar, salt, and white vinegar.
4. Heat the peanut oil in a large pan over medium-high heat. Add the mashed carrot and potato, stir-frying until crispy (about 4 minutes).
5. Add the shredded bamboo shoots, Chinese mushrooms, snow peas, and mix together for an additional 2 minutes.
6. Stir in the sugar, salt, vinegar mixture and cook for another minute.
7. Serve hot with mock crab roe.
